items.name: Assign Work Order to Technician
items.description: Routes a new work order to the nearest available technician.

items.name: Escalate Overdue Work Order
items.description: Notifies the dispatcher when a work order passes its SLA.

items.name: Generate Invoice on Completion
items.description: Creates an invoice when a work order is marked complete.

items.name: Notify Technician of Visit
items.description: Sends the technician an itinerary for the day's visits.

items.name: Sync Asset to Field Service
items.description: Keeps customer assets in step with installed equipment.

items.name: Send Agreement Renewal Reminder
items.description: Cloud flow emailing customers before an agreement lapses.

items.name: Quote Follow-up Reminder
items.description: Cloud flow nudging the sales rep on stale open quotes.

_powerAutomate.name: Quote Follow-up Reminder
_powerAutomate.trigger: Dataverse - When a row is modified
